title: centaurium minus var. austriacum
intro: Centaurium minus var. austriacum, also known as Austrian Centaury, is a plant species belonging to the gentian family, characterized by its delicate yellow flowers and slender stems. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and reducing stress levels. Centaurium minus var. austriacum is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is typically used to treat conditions like bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
